keywords.name: Block
keywords.content: Prevents damage until next turn.

keywords.name: Energy
keywords.content: Is used to play cards from your hand.

keywords.name: Transform
keywords.content: Transformed cards become a random card of the same color, of any rarity, unless specified

keywords.name: Upgrade
keywords.content: Upgraded cards makes them more powerful. Most cards can only be upgraded once.

keywords.name: Eternal
keywords.content: Cards cannot be removed or transformed from your Deck.

keywords.name: Ethereal
keywords.content: Cards Exhaust if they are in your hand at the end of your turn.

keywords.name: Exhaust
keywords.content: Removed from your deck until the end of combat.

keywords.name: Fatal
keywords.content: Triggers when this card kills a non-minion enemy.

keywords.name: Innate
keywords.content: Cards draw at the start of combat.

keywords.name: Retain
keywords.content: Cards are not discarded at the end of your turn.

keywords.name: Replay
keywords.content: Cards are played an additional time.

keywords.name: Unplayable
keywords.content: Cards cannot be played.

keywords.name: Poison
keywords.content: Poisoned creatures lose HP at the start of their turn. Each turn, poison is reduced by 1.

keywords.name: Sly
keywords.content: If this card is discarded from your hand during your turn, play it for free.

keywords.name: Stars
keywords.content: Are an alternative resource needed to play certain cards as the Regent.

keywords.name: Forge
keywords.content: The first time you Forge each combat add Sovereign Blade into your Hand. Add X damage to Sovereign Blade .

keywords.name: Doom
keywords.content: At the end of all enemies turns, if it has at least as much Doom as HP, it dies.

keywords.name: Summon
keywords.content: Osty with X HP. if already summoned, raise his Max HP by X for this combat.

keywords.name: Channel
keywords.content: Ing an Orb puts it into your first empty Orb Slot . If you have no empty slots, your first Orb is automatically Evoked to make room.

keywords.name: Evoke
keywords.content: Consume your rightmost orb and use its evoke effect.

keywords.name: Focus
keywords.content: Increases the effectiveness of Orbs by X.

keywords.name: Lighting Orb
keywords.content:
Passive Deal 3 damage to a random enemy.

Evoke deal 8 damage to a random enemy.

keywords.name: Frost Orb
keywords.content:
Passive Gain 2 block.

Evoke Gain 5 block.

keywords.name: Dark Orb
keywords.content:
Passive Increases stored damage by 6.

Evoke Deal stored damage to the enemy with the lowest HP.

keywords.name: Plasma Orb
keywords.content:
Passive Start your next turn with 1 more Energy .

Evoke Gain 2 Energy .

keywords.name: Glass Orb
keywords.content:
Passive Deal 4 damage to ALL enemies. Decrease this damage by 1 at the start of your turn.

Evoke Deal damage equal to twice its would deal as Passive damage to All enemies.
